title: stoicheo #4748
definition:
1) to proceed in a row as the march of a soldier, go in order
    1a) metaph. to go on prosperously, to turn out well
 2) to walk
    2a) to direct one's life, to live
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to proceed in a row as the march of a soldier, go in order
    1a) metaph. to go on prosperously, to turn out well
 2) to walk

    NASB:  to be in rows, fig. to walk by rule:
